title: Cute Mob Models: LittleMaidMob Pack
description: Adds textures and models from CMMRP to the LittleMaidMob mod.
body:
But more important than that, this patch is also meant to work with the LittleMaidMob Mod. So you'll also need that mod installed first if you're planning on trying this add-on.

If the resource pack is not working correctly, please check following settings.

Instructions:

On 1.12.2:

1. Locate your .minecraft folder.
2. Open the mods or LittleMaidResource folder.
3. Drop the downloaded .zip file directly into the folder. Do not unzip it.
4. Restart your game.



On 1.16.5+:

1. Locate your .minecraft folder.
2. Open the LMMLResources folder.
3. Drop the downloaded .zip file directly into the folder. Do not unzip it.
4. Restart your game.

```
"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Custom Entity Models" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Random Entity" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Animations ➔ Texture Animated" ➔ ON.
```

* Download Cute Mob Models: Resource Pack (1.12.2 VB 1.4) [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-mob-models-resource-pack/version/V.B1.4-1.12.2).
* Download LittleMaidMob Mod (1.12.2) [here](https://github.com/firis-games/LittleMaidReengagedFirisPatch/releases/tag/ver.fp.058)
* Download LittleMaidMobRebirth (1.16.5+) [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/s9rnvwlw641vvhffo9gjr/AG84yc_rNVWktHU9GD7u6_g/LittleMaidReBirth?rlkey=o5r8pebi58oxqcnrjkfzrchit&e=3&dl=0)
* Download LittleMaidModelLoader (1.16.5+) [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/s9rnvwlw641vvhffo9gjr/AHqr2empxLo7q-2qPBHUc9M/LittleMaidModelLoader?rlkey=o5r8pebi58oxqcnrjkfzrchit&e=1&subfolder_nav_tracking=1&dl=0)
